handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `usr_`.
creating → default status = 'pending' unless the caller explicitly set 'active' (admin-created + email-pre-verified).
creating → consume 1 unit of the `user_slot` entitlement for the target tenant (throws QuotaExceeded).
creating → refuse when identity_id + application_id triple already exists (defends against the UNIQUE index race).
creating → refuse when identity->dob is under `auth::CompliantAgePolicy::resolveEffectiveMinimum($region)` — hard compliance floor.
created → invalidate the caller's principal cache in access::PermissionCache.
created → fire UserProvisioned.
updating (status changed) → dispatch the correct lifecycle event per transition (UserActivated / UserSuspended / —).
updating (default_role_id changed) → fire a TenantMembershipRoleChanged targeting the default membership.
updating (preferred_locale changed) → fire UserPreferredLocaleChanged.
deleting → revoke every Sanctum PAT scoped to this User in-process (before the row is gone so the token cache invalidation can find them).
deleted (soft) → fire UserSoftDeleted; schedule PurgeErasedUsersJob for the row's `deleted_at + user.privacy.erasure_hold_days`.
forceDeleted → fire UserHardDeleted (fired ONCE per user_id — ProvisionerObserver refuses re-provisioning against a hard-deleted identity_id + application_id triple for 24h to catch replay bugs).
restored → fire UserRestored.
creating → populate ULID prefix `prf_`.
creating → dob defaults to identity->dob if the caller left it null (denormalisation is intentional per §4.5).
creating → refuse when phone_e164 fails the `valid_e164_phone` rule (belt-and-braces on top of the DB check).
creating → refuse when timezone is not in `\DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()` (IANA tz check).
creating → refuse when locale is not a valid BCP-47 tag.
updating (avatar_url changed) → fire AvatarUpdated (with old + new); do NOT also fire ProfileUpdated for the avatar change.
updating (any other tracked field) → fire ProfileUpdated with `changed_fields` populated from `$model->getDirty()->keys()`.
updating (dob changed) → write to the audit log with `severity=info` even when redacted from the diff (dob edits are compliance-relevant).
deleting → refuse when a User still references this Profile (RESTRICT FK is the DB fallback; the observer surfaces a clearer error).
creating → populate ULID prefix `tmb_`.
creating → default joined_at = now() unless the caller supplied one (audit-preserving import path).
creating → refuse when UNIQUE(user_id, tenant_id) already exists (soft-deleted rows count — caller must restore).
creating → refuse when the target Tenant's application_id ≠ the User's application_id (cross-application memberships forbidden per hierarchy.md §4).
creating → fire UserLinkedToTenant.
updating (is_default flipped true) → set is_default=false on every other TenantMember row for this user_id (invariant: exactly one default).
updating (is_default flipped false + no sibling is_default=true) → refuse (the User must always have a landing tenant).
updating (is_staff_only flipped) → recompute the tenant's athlete-count metric (Wave 7 sports module observer subscribes to this transition).
updating (role_id changed) → fire TenantMembershipRoleChanged with from/to.
deleting → refuse when is_default=true AND the User has no other memberships (caller must promote another or erase the User instead).
deleted (soft) → revoke Sanctum PATs scoped to this (user_id, tenant_id); fire UserRemovedFromTenant.

tenantErased (via hook) → if this membership's tenant is being erased AND is_default=true AND the user has other memberships, promote the oldest sibling to default before the CASCADE deletes this row.
